title: Yoofoss Bamboo Bath Towels 2 Pack Towel Set 500 GSM 70 x 140 cm Extra Large Bath Towels Super Soft & Highly Absorbent Bath Sheets Highly Absorbent and Quick Dry
features: HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL: Made of 85% bamboo fiber and 15% cotton. Bamboo fiber and cotton blended material provides extra softness and excellent moisture absorption, gentle on skin for both kids&adults.
DIMENSION: 70x140 cm. This bath towel set includes 2 bath towels of green&purple- 2 elegant colors help you distingush the towel from others easily.

SUPER SOFT & ABSORBENT: Bamboo bath towels give your skin a softer feel and are highly absorbent. Our bath towels are designed to absorb more liquid than ordinary towels, insuring extremely quick drying after the shower. This bamboo bath sheet also gives the body a soft and delicate touch while absorbing the moisture, leaving you feeling refreshed.

SAFE & DURABLE: Made of healthy material and free from harmful chemicals, our bath towels not only keep your delicate skin safe, but also offer long-lasting durability, so they remain a fresh feeling after multiple wash and dry cycles.

EASY CARE: Machine washable at 30° C for easy care and tumble dry on low. Simply toss them in the machine and wash. These towels become even plusher and softer after the first wash, and fluff up beautifully.
description: Product Description YOOFOSS Bamboo Bath Towels - super soft, absorbent, non-irrirating and safe. You will feel much relaxed and comfortable to wrap yourself in this soft bath towel after a warm shower. Key Features: Large size 70x140cm Dries quickly Healthy and safe Hem stitch reinforced edges to prevent unravelling Super-absorbent and made of bamboo rayon Extra absorbent and retains moisture Machine washable with minimal lint or shedding What is Bamboo Fiber? Bamboo fiber is a kind of fiber extracted from naturally growing bamboo. Bamboo fiber is extremely healthy, absorbent and soft. Bamboo towels are much healthier than traditional cotton because bamboo fiber can keep towels fresh and clean. Ultra Soft and Comfortable A proper combination of Bamboo and Cotton creates a harmonious balance between both comfort and absorption, ensuring our bath towels supreme softness and absorption while retaining its fluffiness for a long time. Highly Absorbent Bamboo is highly water absorbent, able to take up to 3 times its weight in water. In bamboo fabric of our bath towels, this translates to an excellent absorbency ability. Enjoy Luxury Bath Towels Our luxury bath towels gives the body a soft and delicate touch. Wrap yourself in our soft and breathable bamboo towel after a warm shower, making you in good mood all day with comfort and get a sweet night's sleep. Healthy Life Bamboo is a sustainable resource and is one of the world’s fastest and densely growing plants. Choose bamboo towels, enjoy a healthy and recycling lifestyle. Washing Instructions 1. Machine washable at 30° C and tumble dry on low. 2. Before use, we recommend removing excess lint and shedding on the towel. 3. Wash before use for the first time as this will get rid of the excess lint and shedding leftover. 4. For the long-term use of these towels, do not use bleach and fabric softener when you toss them in the machine and wash.
